breakdown: This PR fixes a bug where rewards_box payloads with non-standard keys ('xp' instead of 'xp_gained', 'gold_pieces' instead of 'gold') from LLM generation were passing through without normalization. The fix adds fallback key handling in normalize_rewards_box_for_ui and ensures the normalization is applied in the non-level-up streaming passthrough path. Code quality is solid with good variable naming and defensive isinstance checks, though error handling could benefit from explicit try/except blocks for edge cases.
key_changes: normalize_rewards_box_for_ui now checks for fallback keys (xp→xp_gained, gold_pieces→gold) and removes them after normalization
_resolve_canonical_level_up_ui_pair now calls normalize_rewards_box_for_ui on passthrough_rewards before returning
core_integration.py restructuring to apply normalization consistently across all streaming passthrough paths
New E2E test file validates that LLM-generated messy rewards_box keys are properly normalized before persistence
Test verifies both converted keys exist AND raw fallback keys are removed
